description: Executes a bash command in the project directory and returns the output.

workdir.description: Working directory to run the command in. If not specified, project root is used. If relative, it is relative to project root. If absolute, it is used as is but command will require permission from user.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. If not specified, default timeout is used.

background.description: Background wait time in seconds. If set to N>0, wait up to N seconds then return with current output, PID, and whether process is still running. If set to 0, return immediately with PID and running status.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to return in the output. If not specified, default is 500 lines. Use 0 for no limit.
